title: Hunted.jar
description: a minecraft horror mod about a skinwalker.
body:
### **This mod is NOT a generic "dweller" mod.**
you may need to play for a while before you see it, but don't worry the wait is worth it :)

The basic idea for this mod comes from urban legends of strange creatures that would kill farm animals and wear their skin as a disguise. This mod adds that very creature to your game. They only spawn in forest or plains type biomes (or other similar biomes such as birch forest, or sunflower plains) once they spawn in, they will start slowly killing animals in the area. Eventually their focus will shift to...  y o u .
